name: Fresh Breeze Quiver
description: Notes Part of the Painted Egg Archer Set.
effects: Effect: Fire 3 projectiles in a line with the closest inflicting Paralyzed and the middle inflicting Slowed Middle Projectile: Slowed for 2 seconds Inner Projectile: Paralyzed for 2 seconds Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target With Painted Egg Amulet: Fire an additional 2 lines of projectiles
